历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28498 → 28909 → 39518 → 46287 → 35803. In 2025, it significantly moved forward by about 10484 places compared to 2024, showing a clear recovery, with a baseline ranking of about 35803. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 22 → 17 → 15 → 17 → 14, showing a decreasing trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment increases to 22, an expansion of about 57% compared to 2025, which is significant and may ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 71st nationally, with a steady upward trend in recent years (83rd in 2021 → 71st in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to employment data (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%) attracting attention. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranking is 62nd, with an evaluation of 'average', and moderate short video exposure. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded. It has A+ in Ethnology, A in Ecology, and A- in Statistics, with Ecology directly related to enrollment majors (Ecology Elite Class, Biological Science Base Class), which may attract applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province is estimated to be about 379,000, an increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, reflecting a tightening overall competitive environment. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, which means cross-province enrollment for Jiangsu students. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu is small (only 14 in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant recovery in 2025 rankings, the easing effect of the 57% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, the intensified competition due to the large increase in Jiangsu Physics Category examinees (+45.5%), and the somewhat negative reputation that may suppress application enthusiasm, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025, but the expansion effect will partially offset the pressure from increased examinees. The predicted minimum ranking is about 47079, with a range of 46579 to 47579.

- Computer Science and Technology
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Biological Science (National Biology Base Class)
- Business Administration
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 46579–47579, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (Clinical Medicine and Computer Science have historically higher rankings), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., below 46579), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound, you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety.
